system.requirement: If you wield a bladed weapon in each hand…

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash}, you may add +2. If you do (decide before rolling), mark progress on a strong hit and count a weak hit as a miss.
Once per fight, when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} +edge by making a bold display of your combat prowess, you may reroll any dice.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} by challenging someone to a deal, choose one (before rolling).

  • Add +2.
  • Take +2 momentum on a hit.
